projects.name: Virtuoso
projects.description: Virtuoso is a  fast, accurate and versatile simulation framework designed for virtual memory research. Virtuoso uses a new simulation methodology for estimating OS overheads and models diverse VM designs, incorporating state-of-the-art TLB techniques, page table structures etc. More details in our ASPLOS 2025 paper: https://arxiv.org/pdf/2403.04635
